functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Purple Jellyfish Guide
pages:
Purple Jellyfish Guide

A Choascraft guide for purple jellyfish facts, hazards, parts, and jellyfish gear.

Fact 1

Jellyfish are soft-bodied animals with no bones, brain, or heart.

Fact 2

Most jellyfish drift with currents, but they can pulse their bell to move through water.

Fact 3

Their tentacles can carry stinging cells used for defense and catching prey.

Fact 4

Some jellyfish start life attached to a surface before becoming free-swimming adults.

Fact 5

Jellyfish can be tiny or very large depending on the species.

Fact 6

A jellyfish bloom can change local food webs by eating plankton and young fish.

Choascraft Purple Jellyfish

Purple jellyfish are one of the jellyfish variants chosen by the master jellyfish spawner.

Hazard

Jellyfish hurt nearby non-jellyfish mobs with area damage. Give them room in the water.

Movement

Jellyfish swim, wander, idle, avoid threats, and flock with other water mobs.

Parts

Purple jellyfish use the pink jellyfish gear family. Pink gear uses Pink Jelly.

Rare Parts

Jelly Pearl and Jelly Cyst are important rare parts for stronger jellyfish equipment.

Crafting Key

I = Iron Ingot
J = matching Jelly
P = Jelly Pearl
C = Jelly Cyst

Helmet

III
IJI
JPJ

IJI

Netherite

Use a smithing table with jellyfish armor and a netherite ingot to upgrade it.

Diver Note

Purple jellyfish look calm until the water around them starts to hurt.
